data.name: Arg_ArrayPlusOffTooSmall
data.value: Destination array is not long enough to copy all the items in the collection. Check array index and length.

data.name: Arg_ByteArrayTooSmallForValue
data.value: The array starting from the specified index is not long enough to read a value of the specified type.

data.name: Argument_AddingDuplicate
data.value: An item with the same key has already been added.

data.name: Argument_AlignmentMustBePow2
data.value: The alignment must be a power of two.

data.name: Argument_HasToBeArrayClass
data.value: Must be an array type.

data.name: Argument_InvalidArgumentForComparison
data.value: Type of argument is not compatible with the generic comparer.

data.name: Argument_InvalidFlag
data.value: Value of flags is invalid.

data.name: Argument_SpansMustHaveSameLength
data.value: Length of items must be same as length of keys.

data.name: ArgumentException_OtherNotArrayOfCorrectLength
data.value: The object is not an array with the same number of elements as the array to compare it to.

data.name: ArgumentNull_Array
data.value: Array cannot be null.

data.name: ArgumentNull_SafeHandle
data.value: SafeHandle cannot be null.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_BiggerThanCollection
data.value: Larger than collection size.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_EndIndexStartIndex
data.value: endIndex cannot be greater than startIndex.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_GetCharCountOverflow
data.value: Too many bytes. The resulting number of chars is larger than what can be returned as an int.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_HugeArrayNotSupported
data.value: Arrays larger than 2GB are not supported.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexCount
data.value: Index and count must refer to a location within the string.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexCountBuffer
data.value: Index and count must refer to a location within the buffer.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_ListInsert
data.value: Index must be within the bounds of the List.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_NotGreaterThanBufferLength
data.value: Must not be greater than the length of the buffer.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_SmallCapacity
data.value: capacity was less than the current size.

data.name: AsyncMethodBuilder_InstanceNotInitialized
data.value: The builder was not properly initialized.

data.name: CancellationTokenSource_Disposed
data.value: The CancellationTokenSource has been disposed.

data.name: ConcurrentCollection_SyncRoot_NotSupported
data.value: The SyncRoot property may not be used for the synchronization of concurrent collections.

data.name: Format_ExpectedAsciiDigit
data.value: Expected an ASCII digit.

data.name: Format_UnclosedFormatItem
data.value: Format item ends prematurely.

data.name: Format_UnexpectedClosingBrace
data.value: Unexpected closing brace without a corresponding opening brace.

data.name: InvalidOperation_IComparerFailed
data.value: Failed to compare two elements in the array.

data.name: InvalidOperation_IncompatibleComparer
data.value: The collection's comparer does not support the requested operation.

data.name: InvalidOperation_NullArray
data.value: The underlying array is null.

data.name: InvalidOperation_SpanOverlappedOperation
data.value: This operation is invalid on overlapping buffers.

data.name: InvalidOperation_TimeProviderInvalidTimestampFrequency
data.value: The operation cannot be performed when TimeProvider.TimestampFrequency is zero or negative.

data.name: InvalidOperation_TimeProviderNullLocalTimeZone
data.value: The operation cannot be performed when TimeProvider.LocalTimeZone is null.

data.name: InvalidOperation_WrongAsyncResultOrEndCalledMultiple
data.value: Either the IAsyncResult object did not come from the corresponding async method on this type, or the End method was called multiple times with the same IAsyncResult.
